name: Teriyaki Shish Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 3-pound round steak, cut into 1 1/2-inch thick cubes
8 ounces small whole fresh mushrooms, cleaned
2 medium green peppers, cut into pieces
1 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vegetables and meat. Place all ingredients except tomatoes into a large shallow baking dish.
2. Pour the Teriyaki Marinade over the mixture. Marinate overnight, stirring occasionally.
3. Skewer the marinated ingredients with cherry tomatoes.
4. Grill or broil to desired doneness, brushing with marinade during cooking.
5. Serve over hot cooked rice. The Teriyaki Marinade is also delicious when used to marinate pork chops or chicken.
